brief: Procurement memory record captures a renewal deadline, pricing drift against the prior term, and unresolved service-level questions. Best follow-up is to surface this vendor for early negotiation while comparing substitution risk and implementation switching cost.
searchSummary: renewal risk, pricing drift, vendor review
whyItMatters: One vendor record becomes part of a searchable procurement memory.
